case_title: WINATA, SUTARTO VS KOH, MOON JAH et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,093.25 FILED BY WINATA, SUTARTO AS TO DEFENDANT KOH, MOON JAH KOHEI INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-03-2000 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COURT ORDERED DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT KOH, MOON JAH
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-03-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-14-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT KOHEI INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED MAIL TO MOON JAH KOH RETURNED SIGNED;
MON JAH KOH IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AND IS REPLACED BY KOHEI INC. AS A DEFT. IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES ON 6/14/00, CASE WILL BE DISM W/O PREJ
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT KOH, MOON JAH HEARING SET FOR APR-12-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WINATA, SUTARTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOH, MOON JAH KOHEI INC. $3,093.25 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,119.25 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF APR-12-2000, GRANTED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO SUTARTO WINATA RETURNED, MOVED LEFT NO ADDRESS.
